name: Tofu Yeasties
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice firm tofu about 1/4 inch thick (to yield the largest patty). Be sure to use a high quality firm tofu.
2. Dip the tofu slices in soy sauce (both sides).
3. Place the slices on a plate of nutritional yeast until they are thoroughly breaded (do not use brewer's yeast unless you know the difference!). I prefer to use Red Star brand nutritional yeast.
4. Fry both sides at medium-high heat on a non-stick surface until light brown. No oil is required.
5. Serve as you would any veggie burger.
